source_jobs.title: VFX Supervisor, AI & Animation
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROMISE

Promise is a pioneering film and TV studio at the forefront of the generative AI revolution. Our mission is to reimagine what's possible in entertainment by bringing together the world's most visionary storytellers and GenAI creators, empowered by cutting-edge tools and proprietary workflows. Through bold collaborations and a forward-thinking approach to sourcing IP, we are building a dynamic slate of original and licensed projects that push creative boundaries. Backed by premier VC firms, Promise is shaping a new era in GenAI-powered storytelling, where creativity knows no limits.


ROLE OVERVIEW

As the Senior VFX Supervisor, you will be the key technical and creative innovative thinker driving the integration of real-time and GenAI technologies into our production workflows. This leadership role is responsible for researching new methods in AI, VFX and photoreal techniques, ensuring our productions maintain visual excellence while leveraging the efficiency of modern tools. You will shepherd the visual quality of our projects from concept through final delivery, acting as the bridge between creative vision, on-set Virtual Production (VP), and our proprietary GenAI R&D initiatives.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 1. Generative AI & Pipeline Advancement
    
    - Research and implement new methodologies in VFX, with a core focus on Machine Learning (ML) and Generative AI applications.
      
      - Work closely with R&D teams to prototype and integrate AI tools with standard VFX software to accelerate asset creation, character animation, and compositing.

 2. Virtual & Hybrid Production Leadership
    
    - Lead and supervise complex photoreal integration with plates or full animated sequences for film. Understanding of 4D volumetric capture, LED Volumes, digital environments, character animation, ensuring seamless technical and creative execution on set.
      
      - Knowledge of facial animation
      
      - AI integration with traditional VFX
      
      - Photoreal asset creation and effects
      
      - Animation and Character Animation
    
    - Architect hybrid workflows that successfully bridge traditional post-production VFX with AI workflows.

 3. Creative Supervision & Project Execution
    
    - Provide world-class artistic and technical direction for all visual effects, ensuring the final output aligns perfectly with the Director’s vision.
      
      - Oversee talent selection for large-scale, AAA film and animation projects.
      
      - Mentor and lead internal and external VFX teams and supervisors, fostering an environment of technical excellence and creative problem-solving.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 10+ years of progressive experience in visual effects, including a significant tenure as a VFX Supervisor on large-scale, AAA feature films or premium episodic content.

 - Proven leadership role experience, with the ability to inspire and manage highly skilled creative and technical teams.

 - Demonstrated history of advancing technology or implementing innovative workflows within a major VFX studio or production company.

 - Expert-level knowledge of cinematic techniques, camera systems, lighting, and color science.

 - Exceptional communication and collaboration skills, with experience acting as the primary creative liaison with Directors and Producers.


TECHNICAL SKILLS / QUALIFICATIONS

 - Deep, practical expertise in Machine Learning/Generative AI techniques as they apply to VFX (e.g., neural rendering, content generation, data management).

 - Experience with Unreal Engine or similar real-time platforms in a production setting.

 - Strong command of industry-standard VFX software packages (e.g., Nuke, Maya, Houdini).

 - Solid understanding of ML/data pipelines and asset management in a high-volume production environment.




COMPENSATION

We offer a highly competitive compensation package commensurate with experience, including equity.




BENEFITS

We believe in supporting our tea

You will shepherd the visual quality of our projects from concept through final delivery, acting as the bridge between creative vision, AI animation, and our proprietary GenAI R&D initiat

 - Experience in animation, including a significant tenure as a HOD on large-scale, AAA feature films or premium episodic content.

 - Demonstrated history of advancing technology or implementing innovative workflows within a major Animation or VFX studio or production company.

 - Exceptional communication and collaboration skills, with experience acting as the primary creative liaison with Directors and Producers.

 - Strong command of industry-standard software packages.

 - Solid understanding of ML/data pipelines and asset management in a high-volume production environment.




COMPENSATION

We offer a highly competitive compensation package commensurate with experience, including equity.




BENEFITS

We believe in supporting our team’s well-being and growth. Our comprehensive benefits package includes:

 - Health & Wellness: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance coverage, with employee premiums covered 100%.

 - Time Off: Generous paid time off (PTO) policy, including company holidays and sick leave.

source_jobs.title: Producer, AI & VFX Production
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROMISE

Promise is a pioneering film and TV studio at the forefront of the generative AI revolution. Our mission is to reimagine what's possible in entertainment by bringing together the world's most visionary storytellers and GenAI creators, empowered by cutting-edge tools and proprietary workflows. Through bold collaborations and a forward-thinking approach to sourcing IP, we are building a dynamic slate of original and licensed projects that push creative boundaries. Backed by premier VC firms, Promise is shaping a new era in GenAI-powered storytelling, where creativity knows no limits.


ROLE OVERVIEW

The Producer, Hybrid AI, VFX & Virtual Production will be the central operational and financial leader for key projects on the Promise slate, managing all aspects of the production life cycle for hybrid, VFX, and animation content. Your expertise will be critical in developing production plans and budgets that accurately cost and leverage next-generation techniques, including GenAI asset and VFX projects. You will serve as the primary managerial link between creative leads, R&D engineering, and all production departments, ensuring high-budget projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to world-class standards.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 1. Financial Planning & Generative Costing
    
    - Lead the creation and management of comprehensive budgets for large-scale AI, VFX and animation-heavy film and series projects.
      
      - Develop and implement innovative financial modeling, including GenAI asset pipeline costing, to accurately predict and track costs associated with ML-driven workflows.
      
      - Manage all financial tracking, forecasting, and reporting to ensure projects remain within budget while maximizing creative output.
    
    - Negotiate and manage contracts, payment schedules, and resource allocation for external VFX studios, animation vendors, and specialized GenAI service providers.

 2. Virtual & Hybrid Production Management
    
    - Oversee and produce projects utilizing AI methodologies, that may include animation, LoRa training, etc.
      
      - Collaborate with the Supervisor and Director to plan and schedule production, ensuring smooth integration with AI and traditional techniques.
      
      - Develop and maintain complex production schedules that account for the unique demands of hybrid ML/VFX/Animation pipelines.

 3. Project Execution & Studio Leadership
    
    - Drive the successful execution of AAA films and premium episodic content, including both traditional and fully animated projects.
      
      - Act as the primary production leader, managing cross-departmental communication, mitigating risks, and maintaining a positive, professional, and efficient production environment.
      
      - Ensure all production goals are met, maintaining adherence to the highest technical, creative, and compliance standards (including IP/copyright for GenAI use).




QUALIFICATIONS

 - Extensive, proven experience managing budgets for large-scale films and animation projects.

 - Demonstrated knowledge and experience in Character Animation, Environment Development, or Animation productions.

 - Understanding of GenAI asset pipeline costing or deep familiarity with the financial modeling required for GenAI/ML-driven production workflows.

 - Proven track record of managing a specific high-budget genre (e.g., sci-fi, fantasy, action, animation or anime).


TECHNICAL SKILLS / QUALIFICATIONS

 - Expert-level proficiency in industry-standard budgeting and scheduling software.

 - Familiarity with the technical requirements and costs associated with Machine Learning and Generative AI tools as applied to asset creation.

 - Working knowledge of VFX and Animation pipelines (e.g., Nuke, Maya, Houdini, Blender) and real-time engine platforms (Unreal Engine).

 - Strong understanding of digital asset management, version control, and data transfer protocols for large-scale production.

notes: GenAI-powered film and TV studio with a focus on creative storytelling
